nasb.text: Then Moses spoke to Aaron, and to his surviving sons, Eleazar and Ithamar, “Take the grain offering that is left over from the Lord’s offerings by fire and eat it unleavened beside the altar, for it is most holy.

esv.text: Moses spoke to Aaron and to Eleazar and Ithamar, his surviving sons: “Take the grain offering that is left of the Lord’s food offerings, and eat it unleavened beside the altar, for it is most holy.

cnv.text: 摩西對亞倫和他剩下的兒子以利亞撒和以他瑪說：“獻給耶和華的火祭中剩下的素祭，你們要拿來在祭壇旁邊作無酵餅吃，因為這是至聖的。

ccb.text: 摩西对亚伦及其两个儿子以利亚撒和以他玛说：“你们要把献给耶和华的火祭中剩下的素祭做成无酵饼，在坛边吃，因为这是至圣之物。
